title: Samsung’s wider Z Fold 8 feels just right
summary: The Z Fold 8 is wider than any of Samsung’s previous foldables, and shorter too, a size and shape somewhere between Samsung’s traditional Flip and Fold models. Samsung isn’t the first to the Z Fold 8’s form factor.
